36  public:
38  BasicGraphBuilderService(const Arcane::ServiceBuildInfo & sbi) :
39  ArcaneBasicGraphBuilderObject(sbi),
40  m_current_node_local_uid(0),
41  m_node_global_uid_base(0) {
42  m_graph = subDomain()->defaultGraph();
43  }

46  virtual ~BasicGraphBuilderService() {};
